addNeobank.description: Submit your neobank and our team will reach out to gather more details, review your card, and publish it on the platform.

addNeobank.stepReviewDesc: We reach out, gather info, and evaluate your card

footer.description: Compare fees, cashback, perks and custody models across 40+ crypto debit and credit cards. Find the best digital banking product for your needs.

cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can choose which cookies to accept.
cookie.necessaryDesc: Required for the site to function properly. Cannot be disabled.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our site via Google Analytics.
cookie.marketingDesc: Used for targeted advertising and tracking across websites.

cardDetail.eliteCashbackDesc: Extremely high cashback - best suited for heavy spenders who can maximize rewards.
cardDetail.strongCashbackDesc: Strong cashback profile for everyday spending across multiple categories.
cardDetail.moderateCashbackDesc: Moderate cashback - interesting as a secondary card or niche use case.
cardDetail.noDirectCashbackDesc: No direct cashback - evaluate mainly for features, regions and custody model.
cardDetail.selfCustodyInsightDesc: Non-custodial design - better for power users who prefer holding their own keys.
cardDetail.custodialModelDesc: Custodial model - closer to a traditional fintech experience with simpler UX.
cardDetail.privacyFriendlyDesc: Reduced KYC requirements - attractive for privacy-focused users, may come with lower limits.
cardDetail.fullKycRequiredDesc: Full KYC - typical for regulated neobanks, usually enabling higher limits and broader coverage.
cardDetail.airdropFarmingDesc: Marked for airdrop farming - interesting for users farming ecosystem or protocol rewards.
cardDetail.newerProductDesc: Newer product - monitor stability and community feedback before routing large volumes.

seo.defaultDescription: Compare fees, cashback, perks and custody models across 40+ crypto debit and credit cards. Find the best neobank card for your needs.
seo.faqDescription: Frequently asked questions about neobanks, crypto neobanks, stablecoins, and the Neobank Radar comparison platform.
